name: AURA Sales IQ
description: AI-powered Sales IQ orchestrator that accelerates revenue across every stage of the sales cycle — from lead discovery and qualification through proposal generation, meeting scheduling, follow-up sequencing, pipeline analytics, and deal desk approvals.

skills.name: Lead Discovery & ICP Scoring
skills.description: Finds and scores prospects using Apollo.io, Clearbit enrichment, and ICP framework. Returns ranked lead lists with personalised outreach angles.
skills.input: ICP criteria (industry, headcount range, seniority, geography, tech stack)
skills.output: Ranked list of ICP-scored prospects with contact details, enriched firmographics, and outreach hooks
examples: Find 15 VP of Sales leads at Series B SaaS companies in North America
Research the firmographic profile of acme.com
Find lookalike companies to our current customers in the healthcare space

skills.name: BANT & MEDDIC Qualification
skills.description: Scores prospects against BANT and MEDDIC frameworks using CRM notes, email history, and meeting transcripts. Maps decision makers and recommends next actions.
skills.input: Company name or deal name; optional context from CRM
skills.output: Structured qualification report with BANT/MEDDIC scores, stakeholder map, and recommended next action
examples: Qualify the Acme Corp deal — is it worth pursuing?
Run a MEDDIC assessment on the Runchise opportunity
Who are the decision makers at VantageClinical?

skills.name: Meeting Scheduling & Calendar Management
skills.description: Schedules sales meetings, sends invitations, generates pre-meeting briefs, logs activities to CRM, and schedules reminders.
skills.input: Prospect name/email, meeting type, preferred time/duration
skills.output: Calendar event created, invite sent, meeting prep brief generated
examples: Book a 30-min discovery call with Maya from VantageClinical next Tuesday
Schedule a product demo for the Runchise team on Friday afternoon
Prepare a meeting brief for my call with the Acme Corp CFO

skills.name: AI-Powered Proposal & Quote Generation
skills.description: Generates personalised sales proposals, pricing quotes, ROI models, and SOWs. Creates Google Docs and manages DocuSign workflows.
skills.input: Deal name, prospect company, pricing tier, contract term, discount (if any)
skills.output: Complete proposal document in Google Drive, optional DocuSign envelope
examples: Write a proposal for a $48k/year deal with Runchise — 50 seats, annual prepay
Generate an ROI model for the Acme Corp deal — they have 200 sales reps
Send the signed proposal to VantageClinical via DocuSign

skills.name: Follow-up & Nurture Sequencing
skills.description: Manages post-meeting follow-up emails, multi-touch nurture cadences, no-response re-engagement, and Slack deal alerts.
skills.input: Contact name, last activity date, follow-up type (post-meeting / no-response / re-engage)
skills.output: Draft email sent via Gmail, CRM activity logged, Slack notification if needed
examples: Send a follow-up to all leads who haven't replied in 5 days
Write a post-meeting recap for my call with Runchise today
Re-engage the Acme Corp deal that went dark 3 weeks ago

skills.name: Revenue & Pipeline Analytics
skills.description: Provides weighted pipeline forecasting, quota attainment, deal velocity, win/loss analysis, and at-risk deal identification from CRM data.
skills.input: Time period, rep name (optional), deal stage filter (optional)
skills.output: Structured pipeline report with weighted forecast, stage breakdown, rep leaderboard, at-risk deals
examples: What is our pipeline coverage for Q3?
Show me the weighted forecast for all active deals
Which deals are at risk this month?

skills.name: Deal Desk & Approval Workflows
skills.description: Structures complex deals, evaluates discount requests against policy, routes approval briefs via Slack, and manages contract DocuSign workflows.
skills.input: Deal name, proposed discount, contract term, custom terms requested
skills.output: Deal approval brief, Slack approval request, updated CRM deal record
examples: I need to approve a 25% discount for the Runchise deal
Structure a 3-year enterprise deal for Acme Corp at $180k/year
Flag the non-standard terms in the VantageClinical contract
